title: Unique 33448EU - Eco-Friendly Paper Plates - 23 cm - Silver Colour - 16 Count (Pack of 1)
features: Paper plates measure approximately 23 cm in diameter
Ideal for serving food at a birthday party, Christmas or New Year's Eve party
Combine with other silver party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Your special occasions, dinner parties, and last-minute get-togethers just got a little easier with our eco-friendly silver paper plates. This affordable pack of silver paper plates is a convenient way to add some majestic silver colour to your wedding, New Year's Eve party, silver wedding anniversary party, Christmas party, and more. These disposable plates also make cleaning up after the party is over really quick and easy. As these plates are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Safety Warning No warning applicable
